scripts.build: npx esbuild src/content-script.js --bundle --format=iife --target=es2020 --outfile=dist/content-script.js && npx esbuild src/popup.js --bundle --format=iife --target=es2020 --outfile=dist/popup.js
scripts.watch: npx esbuild src/content-script.js --bundle --format=iife --target=es2020 --outfile=dist/content-script.js --watch & npx esbuild src/popup.js --bundle --format=iife --target=es2020 --outfile=dist/popup.js --watch
scripts.pack:chrome: npm run build && node scripts/pack.js chrome
scripts.pack:firefox: npm run build && node scripts/pack.js firefox
